metrolink: Due to a medical emergency at Altrincham all trams will depart from platform 2 until further notice. We apologise for any inconvenience this may cause

crew_quote: "With this heat, I reckon the AI medic's gonna need a curry, just to cool down and keep it from melting into a puddle of circuits!"
